meaning: vt.閲囦紣妫灄,娓呴櫎鏍戞灄
examples: The fires are likely to permanently deforest the land.
But when we arrived nobody knew we had to protect anything; we had to deforest.
I would captivate them with money before telling them that we needed to deforest their land.
On Star Trek there was DeForest Kelley (Dr McCoy), who was a lovely guy.
Mr. DeFOREST KELLEY (Actor): (As Dr. Leonard "Bones" McCoy) Well, so help me, I'm actually pleased to see you.
